Commemorative Token Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

Creeping Vine
Entangles all enemies with roots. They take 128000 physical damage, can't move, and are blinded for 4 sec. Blinded enemies have a 50% chance of missing their target when attacking. When the entanglement and blindness wears off, 2 random enemies are covered in jelly for 3 sec. During this time, they can't attack or move and take 40% more damage. When the ability wears off, the jelly explodes and sticks to 2 nearest enemies for 4 sec. Their attack speed is reduced by 35%, and they have a 50% chance to miss their target on attack.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
